chapters.title: RHCSA Chapters
chapters.description: Master all 12 chapters of the RHCSA certification

chapter1.title: System Administration Fundamentals
chapter1.description: Learn the basics of Linux system administration

chapter2.title: User and Group Management
chapter2.description: Create and manage users and groups on Linux systems

chapter3.title: File Systems and Storage
chapter3.description: Understand partitioning, LVM, and file system management

chapter4.title: Boot Process and Bootloader
chapter4.description: Master GRUB configuration and boot process

chapter5.title: Networking Configuration
chapter5.description: Configure network interfaces and troubleshoot connectivity

chapter6.title: SELinux (Security Enhanced Linux)
chapter6.description: Understand and manage SELinux policies and contexts

chapter7.title: System Services and Daemons
chapter7.description: Manage systemd services and create custom services

chapter10.title: Logging and Log Analysis
chapter10.description: Configure logging and analyze system logs

chapter11.title: Bash Scripting and Automation
chapter11.description: Write shell scripts and automate system tasks

chapter12.title: Advanced Topics and Troubleshooting
chapter12.description: Advanced system recovery and troubleshooting techniques

home.hero_subtitle: Complete guide with 12 chapters, 125+ commands, interactive terminal, labs, and full exam simulations to help you ace the Red Hat Certified System Administrator exam.
home.features_subtitle: Comprehensive learning platform designed for RHCSA certification
home.cta_subtitle: Begin with Chapter 1 and progress through comprehensive lessons, hands-on labs, and practice exams.

roadmap.easy_desc: Complete chapter fundamentals and build command confidence.
roadmap.medium_desc: Increase hands-on labs and troubleshooting speed.
roadmap.hard_desc: Run exam simulations under pressure and close weak points.

features.chapters_desc: Master all topics covered in the RHCSA certification exam
features.commands_desc: Learn essential commands with real-world examples and output
features.terminal_desc: Practice commands in a safe, simulated Linux environment
features.labs_desc: Hands-on exercises from beginner to advanced levels
features.exams_desc: Complete practice exams with automatic grading and detailed feedback
features.certificates_desc: Track your progress and earn certificates upon completion
